top_signals.title: Tokenization has become a strategic priority for 84% of financial firms
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Scam victims can owe taxes on stolen money. A bill in Congress could offer relief
top_signals.summary: A bill in the House would restore a pre-2018 rule that generally allowed a tax deduction for theft losses and would add other relief for fraud victims.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
